mapper.select: SELECT '임시' AS MODEL, '임시' AS GUBUN, '임시' AS EXPEN_SEL, '' AS EXPEN_SEL_NAME, 0 AS FAB_OUT_AMT, 0 AS STOCK_IN_AMT, 0 AS DIFF_AMT, '구현 예정' AS ERROR_TYPE WHERE 1=0
SELECT 0 AS TOTAL_COUNT, 0 AS NORMAL_COUNT, 0 AS ERROR_COUNT
SELECT '임시' AS TABLE_NAME, '임시' AS MODEL, '임시' AS GUBUN, 'NULL' AS EXPEN_SEL, '구현 예정' AS ERROR_TYPE, '구현 예정' AS REMARK WHERE 1=0
SELECT 0 AS TOTAL_COUNT, 0 AS NORMAL_COUNT, 0 AS ERROR_COUNT
